message:
feat: add custom text selection styling

Enhanced user experience with branded text selection colors:

CSS Changes (app/globals.css):
- Added ::selection pseudo-element styling
- Background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.2) - Sky blue with 20% opacity
- Text color: #f0f9ff - Light sky blue (sky-50)
- Matches site's color scheme (sky/violet/emerald palette)

User Experience Impact:
- Professional branded feel when selecting text
- Better readability during text selection
- Consistent with overall site design language
- Subtle but noticeable polish detail

Technical Notes:
- Uses sky-400 with 20% opacity for background
- Text color ensures high contrast on selection background
- Applied globally to all selectable content
- No browser-specific prefixes needed (modern browsers support ::selection)

Design Philosophy:
- Micro-interaction that reinforces brand identity
- Small detail that contributes to overall polish
- Matches the sky-blue accent color used throughout site
- Enhances perceived quality of the user experience
